prompt: Edit image 1: Transform the desk into a game development workstation. Replace the laptop screen content with the graphic design software from image 2, and add the drawing tablet from image 2 to the desk. Change the user to have a more casual appearance like the person in image 3, and add the coffee cup from image 3.
prompt_refined: Edit `image 1` to transform the depicted medical workstation into a game development workstation. Replace the content on the laptop screen in `image 1` with the graphic design software interface from `image 2`. Add the drawing tablet from `image 2` onto the desk, positioning it to the right of the laptop, replacing the smartphone. Change the user's hands and visible upper body attire in `image 1` to a casual appearance, mirroring the style of the person in `image 3` wearing a floral top. Introduce the white coffee cup with latte art from `image 3` onto the desk, placing it to the left of the laptop, replacing the glass of water. Ensure all existing medical equipment from `image 1` (e.g., stethoscope, clipboard, thermometer) is removed from the desk.
objects: Laptop with graphic design software interface
Drawing tablet on the desk, to the right of the laptop
User's hands with a casual appearance
User's upper body with casual attire (e.g., floral top style)
White coffee cup with latte art on the desk, to the left of the laptop
Glass of water (should not be present)
